node.title: Hereditary
node.description: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences after the death of their secretive grandmother.
node.cast: Toni Collette, Milly Shapiro, Gabriel Byrne

node.title: The Shining
node.description: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter where a sinister presence influences the father into violence.
node.cast: Jack Nicholson, Shelley Duvall, Danny Lloyd

node.title: Coco
node.description: A young musician embarks on an extraordinary journey to the Land of the Dead to unlock his true family history.
node.cast: Anthony Gonzalez, Gael García Bernal, Benjamin Bratt
